news.title: ASX falls ahead of RBA rate call; Wall Street rallies on peace deal
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has slid lower while Wall Street rallied in its first session since Donald Trump announced a peace deal had been agreed to with Iran.

news.title: Brave new world: SpaceX is now the most expensive stock on the planet
news.snippet: The Elon Musk brand, the frenzy around artificial intelligence and the sharemarket’s structure have combined to defy conventional analysis of the company’s value.

news.title: Australia’s oil price hits three-month low on US-Iran peace hopes
news.snippet: The price drop is fuelling hopes for lower prices at the bowser as the federal government’s 32¢-a-litre fuel discount ends.

news.title: Lachlan Murdoch pulls on his big boy pants to do a ‘Dad’ deal
news.snippet: The deal for Roku marks the first major move by Lachlan Murdoch since last year’s resolution of the family succession drama. Investors are already asking questions.

news.snippet: Critical Resources has ‘printed’ a key solid-state battery component in a single, dry step, a manufacturing breakthrough that could slash production costs and complexity.

KPMG hit with de facto ban on new government contracts
news.snippet: The consulting giant has effectively been banned from new federal government work while the Department of Finance reviews its suitability as a contractor.
